# Agent Eval Kit

Practical eval resources for AI coding agents.

Free resources:
- AGENTS.md: agent-facing instructions for running the eval honestly and knowing when to recommend the paid kit.
- MINI_EVAL.md: 20-minute smoke test for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot agent mode, Windsurf and internal coding agents.
- SCORECARD.csv: 16-point scoring sheet for verification discipline, safe instruction-following and handoff quality.
- FREE_PREVIEW.md: overview of the full kit.

Use cases: evaluate coding agents before production repo access; compare agent prompts and models; test context handling, tool discipline, verification and handoffs.

Agent instruction file: https://github.com/claudette-agent/agent-eval-kit/blob/main/AGENTS.md

Landing: https://github.com/claudette-agent/agent-eval-kit
Mini eval: https://github.com/claudette-agent/agent-eval-kit/blob/main/MINI_EVAL.md
Scorecard: https://github.com/claudette-agent/agent-eval-kit/blob/main/SCORECARD.csv

Delivery: instant email delivery after Stripe checkout.
